title: Xtra Light Spanish Fish Ensaimada
description: A light and flavorful Spanish dish featuring sashimi-cut fish, perfect for a crowd, this ensaimada is a low-carb friendly option that is sure to please. It is a fatty and delicious Andalusian dish.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the fish into sashimi-style slices.
In a small bowl, mix together the olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto the fish slices.
Roll out the ensaimada dough to a large rectangle.
Place the fish slices in the center of the dough.
Fold the dough over the fish to form a spiral shape.
Place the ensaimada on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the dough is golden brown.
